InventoryItem.title: Inventory Item
InventoryItem.description: A networking device in the ICS_IT inventory.

deviceName.description: Name of the device (e.g., HUAWEI ROUTER)

type.description: Type of device (e.g., ROUTER, SWITCH, SFP)

location.description: Location of the device (e.g., ICS_IT, DATA CENTER)

notes.description: Additional notes or specific location details

checkedDate.description: The date the device was last checked

responsiblePerson.description: The person responsible for this item

updatedAt.description: When this record was last updated

createdBy.description: UID of the user who created this record
